items.title: Gerrit Cole To Start For Yankees On Friday

items.title: Yankees Birthday of the Day: Gil McDougald
items.summary: Yankees dynasties are usually remembered through their biggest stars. In the 1950s New York featured the likes of Mickey Mantle, Yogi Berra, Whitey Ford, and Joe DiMaggio.
